name: Clav
explanation: An 8-voice plucked-string funk-clavier instrument. Each voice is an independent Karplus-Strong string: a short velocity-scaled excitation burst is injected into a tuned, fractional delay line whose feedback loop carries a damping low-pass, so the string snaps then rings down naturally. A magnetic-style comb pickup tap and a brightness tilt colour the percussive, springy tone; chords play with independent decays. Controls: Attack, Decay, Brightness, Pickup, Damping and Level.
